name: figma-fintech-translate
description: Figma plugin — translate fintech UI screens to 12 languages (Google/MyMemory free tier or OpenAI Pro) with a company glossary

scripts.test: node test/glossary-lookup.test.mjs && node test/estimate-width.test.mjs && node test/glossary-parity.test.mjs && node test/text-format.test.mjs && node test/style-map.test.mjs
